span.p:
Dispatches actions: register
product, enquiry, buyer search

span.p:
Sync SHG data, publish catalogue,
map tenders, ingest prices

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SHG Member / Buyer / Official
(Person)
End users across roles

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Web / PWA
[React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind]
Mobile-first UI: registration, catalogue,
voice assistant, dashboards, admin.
Offline queue via IndexedDB.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Core API
[Node.js, NestJS]
Auth/RBAC, SHG & product registry,
buyer registry, analytics aggregation,
notification orchestration, admin APIs.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ML Services
[Python, FastAPI]
Categorization, forecasting
(demand/price), buyer recommendation
& ranking, explainability (SHAP).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Voice Service
[Python, FastAPI, WebSocket]
Streaming ASR/TTS bridge, Telugu NLP
intent/entity extraction, dialogue
manager, RAG scheme-guidance.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Notification Service
[Node.js, NestJS, BullMQ]
Template engine + provider abstraction:
SMS, WhatsApp, IVR, email;
delivery logs & retries.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PostgreSQL 16
[PostGIS + pgvector]
Relational + geo columns +
vector embeddings.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Redis
Sessions, cache, BullMQ queue,
voice/dialogue state.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Object Storage
[S3 / MinIO]
Images, thumbnails, audio,
exported reports.
